original: I feel like this map inadvertently says a lot about
translation: 我觉得这张地图在不经意间，

original: the relationship that New York City has with Staten Island

original: like it's there but it's tucked away in the corner

original: and it's completely deceptive of its size

original: and I know that this is more a diagram than an actual map

original: but it played a large role in shaping my perception of Staten Island

original: and I'm willing to bet I'm not alone

original: in reality Staten Island is longer than Manhattan and larger in land area

original: it has the longest street in a single burrow in the entire city
translation: 它拥有全市所有行政区中最长的街道，

original: and even with that it's known as The Forgotten burrow

original: it it's a place that people don't really know

original: don't really understand the significance of this location

original: so I wanted to look a little closer at the map of this forgotten burrow

original: and see if I could figure out why it's considered forgotten

original: and why it's part of New York

original: and only because I rode the Staten Island Ferry
translation: 而且只是坐史坦顿岛渡轮过去，

original: and then immediately turned around and rode it back to Manhattan

original: sorry for the delay

original: I met up with Thomas Mato
translation: 我见到了托马斯·马托（Thomas Mato），

original: who is the burough historian of Staten Island
translation: 他是史坦顿岛的行政区历史学家

original: he picked me up and wasted no time before getting into Theory history
translation: 他接到我后，立刻开始介绍这里的历史——

original: of the from Salt Lake City Utah

original: okay the building you see in front of you that's bur Hall okay
translation: 好的，你面前看到的这栋建筑就是行政大楼（Borough Hall）

original: Thomas is just one of the several amazing experts
translation: 托马斯只是帮助我制作这个视频的

original: that are helping me with this video
translation: 几位了不起的专家之一

original: I'm a retired curator of history from the Staten Island Museum

original: you know I always say What's So fascinating about Staten Island history
translation: 你知道，我总是说，史坦顿岛的历史有什么迷人之处？

original: and the answer is everything
translation: 答案是：一切

original: Staten Island is one of the five buroughs that make up New York City

original: and it's distinctly different from the rest of them
translation: 它与其他四个区截然不同，

original: not because it's an island

original: actually most of New York City lies across several different Islands

original: Brooklyn and Queens are on an island Long Island Manhattan is an island

original: the Bronx is the only burrow

original: who entirely is a part of the Mainland of the United States

original: but what does set Staten Island apart

original: is its distance from the rest of the city

original: southernmost part of New York state is on Staten Island

original: by the Outerbridge Crossing it's a southern most part of New York

original: you can tell from my my accent that we're in South right

original: so this leads me to my first question

translation: 即使是与纳罗斯海峡（The Narrows）相比，

original: marking the entrance to the New York Harbor

original: and then takes a sharp turn and encompasses Staten Island

original: and there are several theories as to why this is

original: and whoever won the boat race would get Staten Island

original: and if it took longer than a day

original: the history goes back to pre Lenape times

original: what we know Staten Island is it's largely inhabited by the Raritan

original: but the tap hands are probably intersecting in there

original: it's these small encampments that are there seasonally
translation: 这些小型营地是季节性的，

original: there are a few burials that are found on Staten Island

original: that have some pretty exotic trade goods that are found

original: shells coming from Coastal Florida
translation: 比如来自佛罗里达沿海的贝壳，

original: my name is Drew chapter Ravis
translation: 我叫德鲁·查普特·拉维斯（Drew Chapter Ravis）

original: I a living historian of the 17th and 18th century

original: I'm a citizen and cultural ambassador of the pokoke Indian Nation

original: for New Amsterdam history Center as their aanii and historical consultant

original: so what we know Sten island is that it is called aonga manong
translation: 我们知道史坦顿岛当时被称为“Aquehonga Manacknong”，

original: the place of bad woods
translation: 意为“坏森林之地”

original: could be talking about that
translation: 可能是指那方面

original: there's not a ton of fresh water that's there
translation: 那里没有太多的淡水资源

original: the Dutch were obviously the first people to meet up with the elenae
translation: 荷兰人显然是第一批

original: when they landed on Staten Island
translation: 在史坦顿岛登陆并与勒纳佩人接触的人

original: and they set up a little Colony at a place called The Watering Place
translation: 他们在一个叫“供水站”（The Watering Place）的地方建立了一个小定居点，

original: which is where tomkinsville is
translation: 也就是现在的汤普金斯维尔（Tomkinsville）

original: and it didn't last because there was a war with the Lenape
translation: 但它并没能维持太久，因为后来与勒纳佩人发生了一场战争

original: then there were two more attempts at per settlement
translation: 之后又有两次建立永久定居点的尝试

original: and those two ended with war with the lape
translation: 而那两次也都因与勒纳佩人的战争而告终

original: and finally in 1661 it was petitioned
translation: 最终在1661年，人们申请

original: to set up a permanent settlement on Staten Island
translation: 在史坦顿岛上建立一个永久定居点

original: and that settlement was later called oorp which means old town
translation: 那个定居点后来被称为 Oude Dorp，在荷兰语中意为“老镇”

original: but it had no name until New Dorp was established so it became odor
translation: 但在 New Dorp 建立之前它并没有名字，所以它就成了 Oude Dorp

original: and in present day Staten Island it's called arrow car
translation: 在现在的史坦顿岛，它被称为 Old Town

original: nobody really uses the term term oorp anymore
translation: 现在已经没人再用 Oude Dorp 这个词了

original: but they do say newor
translation: 但他们确实会说 New Dorp

original: although the neighborhood is now called aerocar
translation: 虽然这个社区现在叫阿罗查尔（Arrochar），

original: there is a stop on this singular train line called Oldtown
translation: 但这条唯一的铁路线上的一个车站仍叫 Old Town

original: and a few stops to the South is a stop called New Dorp
translation: 向南几站有一个车站叫 New Dorp

original: Dorp is the Old Dutch term for Town
translation: Dorp 是古荷兰语中表示“城镇”的词

original: and it's just one of the many Dutch terms that's stuck including Staten Island
translation: 它只是众多保留下来的荷兰语术语之一，包括 Staten Island 这个名字

original: which is named for the stats general
translation: 这个名字是为纪念“议会总署”（States General）而命名的，

original: which is the governing body of the Netherlands
translation: 它是当时荷兰的最高领导机构

original: another Legacy of the Dutch is Toad Hill
translation: 荷兰留下的另一个遗产是“蟾蜍山”（Toad Hill）

original: toad meaning death
translation: “Toad”在这里源自荷兰语，意为死亡

original: in my Brooklyn video I talked about the terminal Marine
translation: 在我关于布鲁克林的视频中，我谈到了终碛，

original: which are the hills that were left behind by a glacier
translation: 那是冰川留下的山丘，

original: that led to the placement of places like Prospect Park
translation: 决定了展望公园和绿荫公墓等地的选址

original: and Greenwood Cemetery
translation: 决定了展望公园和绿荫公墓等地的选址

original: and that crosses over into Staten Island
translation: 这种地形也延伸到了史坦顿岛

original: and Toad Hill is part of that
translation: 蟾蜍山就是其中的一部分

original: at 410 ft High it actually marks the tallest point
translation: 它高410英尺，实际上是缅因州以南整个大西洋沿岸的最高点

original: along the entire Atlantic coast south of Maine
translation: 它高410英尺，实际上是缅因州以南整个大西洋沿岸的最高点

original: some people think that may have been some kind of a battle
translation: 有些人认为那里可能曾是美洲原住民和早期定居者之间发生过

original: between Native Americans and the early settlers up there
translation: 某种战斗的地方

original: and that's why it's called Toad Hill
translation: 这就是为什么它被称为蟾蜍山

original: but the Dutch term that still reaches across most of New Netherland
translation: 但在整个新尼德兰地区影响最广的荷兰词，

original: is the Dutch term for Waterway kills
translation: 是表示水道的词——“Kills”

original: in Upstate New York you have Beaverkill and the Catskill Mountains
translation: 在纽约州上州有 Beaverkill 和 Catskill 山迈

original: but on Staten Island you have places like the fresh kills
translation: 但在史坦顿岛，你有像 Fresh Kills 或

original: or Great Kills Harbor
translation: Great Kills 港这样的地方

original: and the Arthur Kill and Kil van Cole are angelized versions
translation: 而亚瑟基尔（Arthur Kill）和基尔凡科尔（Kill van Kull）是英语化的版本，

original: meaning essentially the back Waterway
translation: 本意基本上是“背后的水道”

original: this map shows the 1655 Dutch claim of New Netherland
translation: 这张地图显示了1655年荷兰对新尼德兰的主权主张范围

original: the English had colonies on either side of New Netherland
translation: 英国人在新尼德兰的两侧都有殖民地，

original: and they knew the value of the New York Bay
translation: 他们非常清楚纽约湾的价值

original: their motives were different than the Dutch
translation: 他们的动机与荷兰人完全不同

original: the English were there to set up a colony

original: and expand their power and their influence
translation: 并扩大他们的权力和影响力

original: while the Dutch was really there mostly just for commercial reasons
translation: 而荷兰人主要只是出于商业原因，

original: to make some money
translation: 为了赚钱

original: well the Dutch always were lacking in Settlers
translation: 而且荷兰人总是缺乏定居者

original: they never had a huge population
translation: 他们从未拥有过庞大的人口

original: the English always outnumbered them
translation: 英国人的人数总是远超他们

original: so when the English sailed into the bay In 1664
translation: 所以当英国人在1664年驶入海湾

original: and told the Dutch they were taking it
translation: 并告诉荷兰人他们要接管这里时

original: the Dutch didn't put up much of a fight
translation: 荷兰人并没有进行太多的反抗

original: because they didn't really stand a chance
translation: 因为他们确实没有什么胜算

original: the English renamed New Amsterdam New York
translation: 英国人将新阿姆斯特丹改名为纽约

original: and this is when the split between New York and New Jersey began
translation: 纽约和新泽西的分离就是从这时开始的

original: but the borders were very vague
translation: 但当时的边界非常模糊

original: when King Charles II acquired New Netherland
translation: 当国王查理二世获得新尼德兰后

original: he gave it to his brother James
translation: 他把它送给了他的弟弟詹姆斯

original: he is the Duke of York
translation: 他就是约克公爵

original: that's why it's named New York
translation: 这就是为什么它被命名为纽约

original: in turn James gave a portion of this land to his friends
translation: 詹姆斯反过来把这片土地的一部分送给了他的朋友们，

original: this was the birth of New Jersey
translation: 这就是新泽西的诞生
